---
title = "Configuration Reference"
---

*Calepin* is configured through `_calepin/config.toml` and TOML front matter.

## Project config

The `_calepin/config.toml` file controls site-wide settings like title, navbar,
sidebar contents, and output targets.

## Front matter

Each `.qmd` file can set or override options in its TOML front matter:

```toml
---
title = "My Page"
date = "2025-01-15"

[toc]
enabled = true
---
```
